mapper.select: SELECT BADGE_ID, NAME, DESCRIPTION, CONDITION_TEXT, ICON_URL, CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS EARNED_AT FROM LQ_BADGE ORDER BY BADGE_ID ASC

SELECT B.BADGE_ID, B.NAME, B.DESCRIPTION, B.CONDITION_TEXT, B.ICON_URL, UB.EARNED_AT FROM LQ_USER_BADGE UB INNER JOIN LQ_USER U ON U.USER_ID = UB.USER_ID INNER JOIN LQ_BADGE B ON B.BADGE_ID = UB.BADGE_ID WHERE UPPER(NVL(U.STATUS, 'ACTIVE')) = 'ACTIVE' AND U.NICKNAME = #{_parameter} ORDER BY UB.EARNED_AT DESC, UB.USER_BADGE_ID DESC

SELECT B.BADGE_ID, B.NAME, B.DESCRIPTION, B.CONDITION_TEXT, B.ICON_URL, UB.EARNED_AT FROM LQ_USER_BADGE UB INNER JOIN LQ_USER U ON U.USER_ID = UB.USER_ID INNER JOIN LQ_BADGE B ON B.BADGE_ID = UB.BADGE_ID WHERE UPPER(NVL(U.STATUS, 'ACTIVE')) = 'ACTIVE' AND UB.USER_ID = #{value} ORDER BY UB.EARNED_AT DESC, UB.USER_BADGE_ID DESC
